videos.headline: Makhi Hughes plows into the end zone for 2-yard Tulane TD
videos.description: Makhi Hughes scores for Tulane on the short 2-yard touchdown in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Makhi Hughes plows into the end zone for 2-yard Tulane TD) 2023/10/13 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Demeer Blankumsee hauls in 47-yard reception) 2023/10/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Demeer Blankumsee holds on for tough TD catch for Memphis
videos.description: Demeer Blankumsee holds on for an unreal touchdown catch on behalf of the Memphis Tigers in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Demeer Blankumsee holds on for tough TD catch for Memphis) 2023/10/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tigers score before halftime as Joseph Scates is left wide open
videos.description: Memphis scores before halftime as Tulane leaves Joseph Scates wide open near the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tigers score before halftime as Joseph Scates is left wide open) 2023/10/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Koby Drake leaps up for Memphis TD
videos.description: Memphis extends its lead over Tulane as Koby Drake hauls in the tough touchdown catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Koby Drake leaps up for Memphis TD) 2023/10/13 ESHEET
